title: Spontaneous and deliberate creative cognition during and after psilocybin exposure.

assets.abstract: Creativity is an essential cognitive ability linked to all areas of our everyday functioning. Thus, finding a way to enhance it is of broad interest. A large number of anecdotal reports suggest that the consumption of psychedelic drugs can enhance creative thinking; however, scientific evidence is lacking. Following a double-blind, placebo-controlled, parallel-group design, we demonstrated that psilocybin (0.17 mg/kg) induced a time- and construct-related differentiation of effects on creative t

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.
